mnemonics: AIES: Artificial Intelligence Expert Systems - An Intelligent Expert's Solution
keyPoints: Expert systems mimic human decision-making using a knowledge base and inference engine
Knowledge representation (rules, frames) is core to expert system design
Inference engines apply rules through forward or backward chaining to reach conclusions
commonMistakes: Confusing expert systems with general AI (they're narrow, domain-specific applications)
Assuming expert systems can learn on their own (they require human knowledge engineering)
Mixing up forward chaining (data-driven) and backward chaining (goal-driven) inference methods
